Our Ancestral Orchards
15+Years of Legacy
15Acres of Orchards
10K+Trees Nurtured
Our Heritage

Three Generations
of Mango Royalty

In 2010, our father planted the first Kesar saplings on the sun-drenched slopes of Pune. He believed that the finest mangoes come not from science alone, but from a deep reverence for the land, the seasons, and the ancient wisdom passed down through generations.

Today, Nilkamal Agro Farms spans over 15 acres of heritage orchards. Every mango that leaves our farm carries the warmth of our soil, the sweetness of monsoon rains, and the love of a family that has dedicated its life to growing the king of fruits.

🌿
Chemical-Free Cultivation

No pesticides, no shortcuts—only organic methods our ancestors trusted.

🤲
Hand-Picked with Care

Every mango is touched by human hands, never machines, from tree to box.

The Sacred Lifecycle

From Seed to
Golden Perfection

Witness the miraculous journey of our Kesar — a twelve-month symphony of nature

The Seed
What Sets Us Apart

Why Our Mangoes
Reign Supreme

Every box that leaves our farm carries our family's honour.
